category_sources: Official rasusa GitHub README describes randomly subsampling sequencing reads or alignments.
source_facts.description says rasusa randomly subsamples sequencing reads or alignments.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides usage documentation for reads and alignments.
source_facts.homepage is the official JOSS DOI for the rasusa paper.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/mbhall88/rasusa, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official README documents FASTA/FASTQ reads, SAM/BAM alignments, coverage, genome size, and output options.
source_facts.description identifies sequencing read and alignment subsampling.
